title: salix × bifida
intro: Salix × bifida, also known as hybrid willow or weeping willow, is a plant hybrid between the Salix alba (white willow) and Salix fragilis (crack willow) species. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties due to the presence of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × bifida include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating fever and rheumatic conditions. Salix × bifida is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
